title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Dry Nose
description: Eucalyptus globulus essential oils contains a compound called eucalyptol, which is a key ingredient that helps relieve congestion and dryness in the nose. Eucalyptol has a decongestant property that helps open up airways and reduce inflammation, making it easier to breathe. Another compound found in eucalyptus oil is cineole, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm the nasal passages.
